"Your peace is our purpose."

Welcome to SAIBA Hair Salon & Spa!

SAIBA is more than a salon — it is a calm, beautiful space created with love, faith, patience, and purpose.

Our vision is to bring luxury hair, beauty, and wellness services to every age, while building a warm community where everyone feels seen, cared for, and transformed.

We can't wait to welcome you soon in Lexington, MA.

What We Offer

Services & pricing

Thoughtfully designed treatments to restore, refresh, and renew — for every body and every mood.

Facial Treatments

Customized facials using clean, skin-loving formulas to brighten, hydrate, and restore your natural glow. Suitable for all skin types.

Starting from $75 · 60–90 min
Massage Therapy

Swedish, deep tissue, and aromatherapy massage by certified therapists. Release tension and step back into ease.

Starting from $90 · 60–90 min
Hair Care

Expert cuts, color, and treatments tailored to your texture and lifestyle. We work with all hair types with equal expertise.

Starting from $55 · Varies by service
Nail Services

Manicures, pedicures, gel, and nail art. Hygienic, precise, and always on-trend — or classically timeless, your call.

Starting from $35 · 45–75 min
Body Treatments

Exfoliating scrubs, wraps, and hydrating body rituals to nourish skin head to toe. A full reset for your body and mind.

Starting from $85 · 60 min
Spa Packages

Curated wellness journeys combining multiple treatments at a relaxed pace. Perfect for a gift, a celebration, or simply yourself.

Starting from $150 · 2–3 hrs
S

Our Story

"I created SAIBA as a place where everyone feels cared for — women, men, children, seniors, and families. Beauty is not only about looking good; it is about feeling peaceful, confident, and seen."

Founder Sahis Shahi

Meet the Saiba Team

Meet our specialists

A dedicated team of licensed professionals who treat every client as family.

S
Sahis — Founder
Spa Director & Senior Therapist

With over a decade of experience in holistic wellness, Sahis founded Saiba with a simple mission: a place where everyone belongs and every visit feels like coming home.

A
Team Member
Licensed Esthetician

Specializing in advanced facials and skin analysis, bringing a meticulous, science-backed approach to every skin concern.

M
Team Member
Hair Stylist & Colorist

A master colorist trained in balayage and precision cuts, known for listening carefully and delivering transformations that feel truly personal.
